description: Fix 9 UI issues in PiDesk workspace layout

userStories.title: Restructure PromptDock - integrate into canvas container
userStories.description: Move the PromptDock from being a separate dock component to being part of the canvas container. The text box should be integrated directly into the canvas area, not as a separate dock.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove the separate PromptDock wrapper div with z-20 and bg-[#131313] styling
Integrate the prompt input directly into the canvas container or main content area
The prompt input should no longer be a 'dock' but part of the canvas
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: workspace-shell.tsx, prompt-dock.tsx - restructure so prompt is part of canvas, not separate dock

userStories.title: Restore dotted grid background on canvas
userStories.description: The dotted grid was removed from the canvas. Restore it by ensuring CanvasGrid is properly rendered and visible.
acceptanceCriteria: CanvasGrid component is rendered with proper visibility
Dotted grid pattern is visible on the canvas background
Grid uses the snapGridSize for proper spacing
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: canvas-grid.tsx, workspace-shell.tsx - grid exists but may be hidden or opacity too low

userStories.title: Add swipe animation to prompt input based on thread state
userStories.description: Add smooth swipe up/down animation to the prompt input that shows/hides based on whether user is in a thread conversation.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompt input animates smoothly (swipe up) when entering a thread
Prompt input animates smoothly (swipe down) when leaving a thread
Animation uses CSS transitions or Framer Motion
Visibility controlled by activeThreadId state
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: prompt-input.tsx or prompt-dock.tsx - add animation based on activeThreadId

userStories.title: Fix left sidebar content overlap with left rail
userStories.description: The left sidebar content is being overlapped by the left rail. Move the content (main, new thread, current thread) to the right to account for the rail width.
acceptanceCriteria: Left sidebar content is no longer overlapped by left rail
Content is properly offset by the rail width (64px)
Layout works correctly when sidebar is expanded/collapsed
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: left-sidebar.tsx, workspace-shell.tsx - add proper left margin or padding

userStories.title: Make Explorer, Search, Source, Debug, Extensions functional
userStories.description: The left rail buttons (Explorer, Search, Source, Debug, Extensions) need to be functional and show different views when clicked.
acceptanceCriteria: Each button in left rail is clickable and functional
Clicking a button shows the corresponding view
Active button has visual indication
Views can be: file explorer, search panel, source control, debug panel, extensions
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: left-rail.tsx - add state management and view switching logic

userStories.title: Combine project icons with navigation in left rail with animation
userStories.description: Combine project icons and navigation. When clicking a project icon, animate (shift icons out) to show navigation options (Source, File, Debug, Extensions) with a back button to return to project selector.
acceptanceCriteria: Project icons are shown initially
Clicking a project icon triggers animation that shifts icons out
Navigation options (Source, File, Debug, Extensions) appear after animation
Back button allows returning to project selector view
Animation is smooth and polished
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: left-rail.tsx - major restructuring with animation state

userStories.title: Replace OPERATOR_01 with PiDesk and version in status bar
userStories.description: Replace the 'OPERATOR_01' text in the status bar with 'PiDesk' and the current version number.
acceptanceCriteria: OPERATOR_01 is replaced with 'PiDesk'
Version number from package.json is displayed
Format: 'PiDesk v{version}'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: status-bar.tsx - read version from package.json (0.1.0)

userStories.title: Remove duplicate OPERATOR_01 from status bar
userStories.description: There appears to be a duplicate OPERATOR_01 span in the status bar. Remove the duplicate.
acceptanceCriteria: Duplicate OPERATOR_01 span is removed
Only one PiDesk version indicator remains
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: status-bar.tsx - check for and remove duplicate

userStories.title: Fix title bar - remove OBSIDIAN_CMD, keep traffic lights
userStories.description: Remove 'OBSIDIAN_CMD' text from title bar as it clashes with traffic lights. Keep only the traffic lights and other navigation elements.
acceptanceCriteria: OBSIDIAN_CMD text is removed from title bar
Traffic lights remain visible
Other navigation elements (TERMINAL, LOGS, FILES, NETWORK) remain
Layout is not broken
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: title-bar.tsx - remove the OBSIDIAN_CMD span
